status: exact L5--L8 realized cursor-jump census: the finite universal x-core is not Markov under unrelated chronological anchors, even after retaining the exact jump and complete predecessor-core capped occupancy; not a uniform far-secant lemma or unconditional theorem

canonical_run.command: env OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 OMP_NUM_THREADS=1 MKL_NUM_THREADS=1 VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS=1 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=1 nice -n 15 python3 -B design/x_axis_cursor_jump_injection.py run --output /tmp/x-axis-cursor-jump-injection-canonical.json

independent_repeat.difference_audit: the 25 differing leaves are exclusively per-level/per-order elapsed timings and total resource elapsed time

pinned_scope.construction: the actual selected connector word in each pinned gate2 L5--L8 construction pickle
pinned_scope.transition_semantics: all anchors are initially present; insert the complete recorded connector at cursor r, then inspect cursor r+1 before inserting its connector

key: complete predecessor promoted-core capped point occupancy, with values 0, 1, or 2
both local tile step signatures, gap positions, tile sizes, schedule phases, tile-local action ordinals, guard flags, and fragile flags
target: successor offsets geometrically outside the predecessor core
capped point occupancy injected at those offsets
active two-point x-lines injected at those offsets
strongest_state_tested.exactness: state keys and targets were compared as exact tuples and arbitrary-size integers; SHA-256 values are output commitments only
strongest_state_tested.consequence_of_noncongruence: for fixed predecessor/successor steps and exact jump the geometric target mask is fixed, so a differing target witnesses genuinely different remote point or active-line injection not determined by the local core state

proved_by_finite_computation: Every consecutive cursor transition in all three stated orders of the pinned L5--L8 realized constructions was scanned without a distance or endpoint cutoff.
The absolute predecessor/successor promoted-core relation, capped point occupancy, active x-lines, and injection masks were computed exactly.
All three orders have repeated exact-jump-plus-prior-occupancy states with different successor injection targets, including cross-level noncongruence.
The pipeline and left-to-right orders reduce injection counts and observed jump sizes but do not make the tested local state Markov.
No just-inserted predecessor interior is a remote injection; the remote source is an anchor or an interior inserted at an older cursor.
referee_interpretation.strongest_obstruction: A finite state containing only the current universal x-core, bounded local tile/order data, and even the exact next cursor translation loses exterior birth/address information that later re-enters the core. A global birth-shell/address state or a separate ranking controlling that injection is required.
referee_interpretation.mod81_warning: The mod-81 phase-plus-occupancy refinement is almost entirely singleton in every order, so its few congruent repeats are not stabilization evidence; pipeline and left-to-right still contain noncongruent repeats.
not_proved: Any statement beyond the pinned finite L5--L8 realized connector choices or any L9/infinite stabilization claim.
A uniform quantitative bound on exterior injection, a contracting birth-shell transfer operator, or a finite global cursor state.
Closure for non-x secants, exact axial collision provenance, or all connector actions rather than the selected realized words.
A positive connector-survivor bound, a greatest safety fixed point, or an unconditional theorem.
